name: inventory-drift
command: bash -c 'while true; do "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/proactive-watch/watch.sh" inventory-drift 2>&1 || true; sleep 30; done'
description: Skills, agents, and commands inventory vs filesystem. Polls every 30 seconds.

name: version-drift
command: bash -c 'while true; do "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/proactive-watch/watch.sh" version-drift 2>&1 || true; sleep 30; done'
description: Version consistency across README, project-manifest, and CHANGELOG. Polls every 30 seconds.

name: cross-doc-drift
command: bash -c 'while true; do "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/proactive-watch/watch.sh" cross-doc-drift 2>&1 || true; sleep 30; done'
description: CHANGELOG gaps and cross-document consistency checks. Polls every 30 seconds.

name: stale-handoff
command: bash -c 'while true; do "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/proactive-watch/watch.sh" stale-handoff 2>&1 || true; sleep 30; done'
description: Session memory references to deleted files or closed projects. Polls every 30 seconds.
